title: Assess opt-in dispatcher policy
goal: Assess and red-test a disabled-by-default dispatcher policy for autonomous-ready tasks before implementation.

acceptance.assertion: Dispatcher design is disabled by default and requires explicit local enablement.
The assessment lists required gates for ready state, dependencies, capabilities, conflict checks and GitHub observation.
Any later dispatcher implementation must include a dry-run mode before creating a run.
The policy lists actions that remain outside dispatcher authority.
